notas.titulo: 'Off-Roading Is In Our DNA:' Nissan Talks Frontier Sport, Xterra, And What's Next
notas.descripcion: Motor1 sits down with Nissan’s Senior Manager of Product Planning, Brent Hagan, to discuss the Frontier Sport and all things off-roading.

notas.titulo: Audi Nuvolari Hits Monaco With New Design Built On 'Absolute Simplicity'
notas.descripcion: Tired of the modern car's busy design? Audi has a cure.

notas.titulo: Toyota Stuffed Two Engines Into A Seven-Cylinder Camry With 700 HP
notas.descripcion: It has the GR Corolla's three-pot up front and a new four-cylinder turbocharged engine in the back.
